item.title: Spray Welding Won’t Fix This
item.description: A closer look at why spray welding isn’t the right solution here, and what the repair challenge involves instead. A practical example of workshop problem-solving and precision engineering. What

media:content.media:description: A closer look at why spray welding isn’t the right solution here, and what the repair challenge involves instead. A practical example of workshop problem-solving and precision engineering. What

item.title: Machining and Welding a Cylinder Barrel
item.description: A precise machining and welding repair brings a cylinder barrel back into service. This workshop process highlights careful setup, metalworking skill, and practical engineering problem-solving. What

media:content.media:title: Machining and Welding a Cylinder Barrel
media:content.media:description: A precise machining and welding repair brings a cylinder barrel back into service. This workshop process highlights careful setup, metalworking skill, and practical engineering problem-solving. What

item.title: Simple Parts, Big Savings
item.description: A straightforward engineering approach can deliver major savings. This video highlights practical workshop thinking, precise machining, and efficient problem-solving behind a simple part. What small

item.title: Building a Walkway Platform for a Lathe
item.description: A practical workshop build as the walkway platform takes shape for a large lathe. The focus is on careful fabrication, solid engineering, and precise fit-up throughout the process. A satisfying look

media:content.media:title: Building a Walkway Platform for a Lathe
media:content.media:description: A practical workshop build as the walkway platform takes shape for a large lathe. The focus is on careful fabrication, solid engineering, and precise fit-up throughout the process. A satisfying look

item.title: Chain Clamp Vices for a Zayer Mill
item.description: A look at making chain clamp vices for a Zayer milling machine, with careful machining and workshop fabrication throughout. A practical example of precision tooling built for heavy engineering work.

media:content.media:title: Chain Clamp Vices for a Zayer Mill
media:content.media:description: A look at making chain clamp vices for a Zayer milling machine, with careful machining and workshop fabrication throughout. A practical example of precision tooling built for heavy engineering work.

item.title: Repairing Stripped and Damaged Bolt Holes
item.description: Damaged and stripped bolt holes are carefully restored to ensure a secure fit and reliable performance once the equipment returns to service.

media:content.media:title: Repairing Stripped and Damaged Bolt Holes
media:content.media:description: Damaged and stripped bolt holes are carefully restored to ensure a secure fit and reliable performance once the equipment returns to service.

item.title: Rust Removal and Repair Work
item.description: Heavy rust is removed and damaged metal is repaired, giving worn components a fresh start and extending their service life.

media:content.media:title: Rust Removal and Repair Work
media:content.media:description: Heavy rust is removed and damaged metal is repaired, giving worn components a fresh start and extending their service life.

item.title: 150-Tonne Hydraulic Jacking Cylinder Rebuild
item.description: A complete rebuild brings a 150-tonne hydraulic jacking cylinder back to working condition, ready to handle demanding industrial applications.

media:content.media:title: 150-Tonne Hydraulic Jacking Cylinder Rebuild
media:content.media:description: A complete rebuild brings a 150-tonne hydraulic jacking cylinder back to working condition, ready to handle demanding industrial applications.

item.title: Repairing Worn-Out Dozer Yokes
item.description: Years of heavy use have taken their toll on these dozer yokes. Precision machining and welding restore them for another life in the field.

media:content.media:title: Repairing Worn-Out Dozer Yokes
media:content.media:description: Years of heavy use have taken their toll on these dozer yokes. Precision machining and welding restore them for another life in the field.

item.title: Parabolic Drill for a Coolant Drawbar Bolt
item.description: A parabolic drill is used to machine a coolant drawbar bolt with greater accuracy, improving chip evacuation and cutting performance.

media:content.media:title: Parabolic Drill for a Coolant Drawbar Bolt
media:content.media:description: A parabolic drill is used to machine a coolant drawbar bolt with greater accuracy, improving chip evacuation and cutting performance.

item.title: Repairing a 150-Tonne Jacking Cylinder
item.description: A massive 150-tonne jacking cylinder undergoes precision repairs to restore its strength, performance, and reliability under extreme loads.

media:content.media:title: Repairing a 150-Tonne Jacking Cylinder
media:content.media:description: A massive 150-tonne jacking cylinder undergoes precision repairs to restore its strength, performance, and reliability under extreme loads.

item.title: Removing a Stubborn Gland from a CAT 24M Cylinder
item.description: A seized gland refuses to budge, turning a routine CAT 24M cylinder repair into a challenging job that requires patience and precision.

media:content.media:title: Removing a Stubborn Gland from a CAT 24M Cylinder
media:content.media:description: A seized gland refuses to budge, turning a routine CAT 24M cylinder repair into a challenging job that requires patience and precision.

item.title: Double the Power With Franna MAC-14
item.description: The Franna MAC-14 takes on demanding lifting tasks, showcasing the strength, versatility, and performance that make it a job-site powerhouse

item.title: Vintage Huron Rebuild in Progress
item.description: A vintage Huron machine is carefully restored, combining skilled craftsmanship with modern techniques to preserve a remarkable piece of workshop history.

media:content.media:title: Vintage Huron Rebuild in Progress
media:content.media:description: A vintage Huron machine is carefully restored, combining skilled craftsmanship with modern techniques to preserve a remarkable piece of workshop history.

item.title: Megabore Walkway Platform Nears Paint Prep
item.description: Sikaflex is down, tread plate is in, and the stitch welding is complete on the Megabore walkway platform. A clean example of practical fabrication and careful workshop work. Ready for painting soon?

media:content.media:title: Megabore Walkway Platform Nears Paint Prep
media:content.media:description: Sikaflex is down, tread plate is in, and the stitch welding is complete on the Megabore walkway platform. A clean example of practical fabrication and careful workshop work. Ready for painting soon?
